name: House of Architects
tagline: You don't just build things. You build things that last.
description: Architects see systems where others see chaos. They build infrastructure that outlives them — frameworks, institutions, platforms that become the foundation others build on top of.
collective_impact: Built systems that outlasted empires. Their work still runs the world.

lineage.name: Leonardo da Vinci
lineage.quantified_impact: Designed flying machines 400 years before aviation. 13,000+ pages of notebooks still referenced in engineering today.

lineage.name: Nikola Tesla
lineage.quantified_impact: His AC power system delivers electricity to 5.5 billion people every day. 300 patents across 50 countries.

lineage.name: A.R. Rahman
lineage.quantified_impact: Sold 300M+ albums globally. India's highest-grossing film composer. Oscar, Grammy, and BAFTA — only Indian to hold all three.

lineage.name: Jensen Huang
lineage.quantified_impact: Built NVIDIA from $0 to $3.3 trillion — the world's most valuable company. His GPU architecture powers 90% of all AI training globally.

name: House of Vanguards
tagline: You don't wait for permission. You don't wait at all.
description: Vanguards move before the market is ready and create the conditions for others to follow. They lead with conviction, build tribes, and change the rules of entire industries.
collective_impact: Led movements that changed entire markets. Went first so the world could follow.

lineage.name: Sun Tzu
lineage.quantified_impact: The Art of War cited by 47 of Fortune 500 CEOs. Applied in military strategy across 2,500 years and 54 countries. Still in print after 2,500 years.

lineage.name: Nelson Mandela
lineage.quantified_impact: Freed 56 million people from apartheid. Served 27 years in prison without breaking. Built South Africa's democracy from prison cell to presidency.

lineage.name: Rihanna
lineage.quantified_impact: Built $1.4 billion Fenty Beauty in 4 years. Expanded foundation range to 50 shades — forcing every major cosmetics brand to follow. 260M social followers.

lineage.name: Satya Nadella
lineage.quantified_impact: Grew Microsoft from $300B to $3.1 trillion in 10 years. Bet the company on cloud + AI. Turned around a company everyone wrote off.

name: House of Alchemists
tagline: You turn the ordinary into the extraordinary. Every time.
description: Alchemists see connections no one else sees. They take existing elements — ideas, technologies, markets — and recombine them into something the world has never experienced.
collective_impact: Turned ideas into entirely new categories. Created things that didn't exist before.

lineage.name: Rumi
lineage.quantified_impact: His poetry translated into 23 languages. Best-selling poet in the USA in 2023 — 800 years after writing. 66,000 verses that still generate licensing revenue.

lineage.name: Albert Einstein
lineage.quantified_impact: E=mc² enables every nuclear power plant and MRI machine on earth. GPS wouldn't work without his relativity equations — a $150B industry depends on his theory.

lineage.name: Steve Jobs
lineage.quantified_impact: Created 3 industry-defining products (Mac, iPod, iPhone). Apple went from near-bankruptcy in 1997 to $3T in 2023. 1.5 billion active Apple devices today.

lineage.name: Sam Altman
lineage.quantified_impact: Launched ChatGPT to 100 million users in 5 days — fastest product in history. OpenAI valued at $157B. Triggered the global AI race across every industry.

name: House of Pathfinders
tagline: You went first. So others could know it was possible.
description: Pathfinders explore territories that don't yet have maps. They are driven by discovery — the need to see what's over the next horizon, and the courage to go there before anyone else.
collective_impact: Went first so others could follow. Proved it was possible so others could dare.

lineage.name: Amelia Earhart
lineage.quantified_impact: First woman to fly solo across the Atlantic (3,300 km, 14 hours). Inspired 1 million+ women to enter aviation. Her legacy funded 500+ aviation scholarships.

lineage.name: Charles Darwin
lineage.quantified_impact: 5-year solo voyage → theory that became the foundation of all biology. 170 years of evolutionary science built on his framework. Evolution cited in 500K+ academic papers.

lineage.name: Christopher Nolan
lineage.quantified_impact: Directed 12 films totalling $6B in global box office. Created new narrative structures (non-linear storytelling) adopted by 40% of prestige TV since 2010.

lineage.name: Elon Musk
lineage.quantified_impact: Put reusable rockets into orbit (80% cost reduction). 6,000 Starlink satellites. 3M Tesla EVs on road. SpaceX valued at $350B. Simultaneously running 6 companies.
